TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqCon-dialog2_ciwas_tiwas 2021s

S.TRANSL: 那位（他）已過世。
He already died.

S.FORM: wada gedang tikuh pawan nii kiya.
S.TRANSL: 在這Pawan小的時候那位（他）就已過世。
He died at the age when Pawan was small.
他因（與別人）打架而死去。
He fought with others, and he died.
約死於30歲。
He was about thirty years old.
(因打架的傷)身體羸弱很久。
He was ill for a long time.
你（Pawan）那時還小嗎？
Were you a child at that time?

S.FORM: laqi kana deheya nii umbeyax naq meepah bubu na.
S.TRANSL: 他們（指Pawan的兄弟姐妹）都還小，他們的媽媽很能工作（才得以養育其子女）。
Their siblings were all small. Their mothers was very diligent (so that she could bring up children.)
我那時還小，是我去做。
At that time I was still small. I went to do...

S.FORM: maha theyaq tikuh a phuling ka uqian daha camac.
S.TRANSL: （那時）家裡有獵物可食用是由我跟隨族人去打獵而得的。
At that time, I went with elders to hunt game for us to eat.

S.FORM: ini wa kndalax ku sbiciq ini ku keepah han.
S.TRANSL: 不是哦，我從小經常不做農務。
I did, I rarely did farmwork when I was young.

S.FORM: wana tikuh qolic sdurakan mu ma.
S.TRANSL: 而從小就以獵田鼠為樂。
and I played chasing mouse since small,

S.FORM: musa ku theyaq phuling seediq peni.
S.TRANSL: 且跟著族人們去狩獵。
I followed elders to go hunting.

S.FORM: ano ano ba kingan cece su na.
S.TRANSL: 你(Pawan)僅有一位姐姐是嗎？
Do you only have one elder sister?

S.FORM: tena ku mke tena ku mangan mangan miyan sume a awi takun muudus na han.
S.TRANSL: Awi Takun還活著時（那時）我已經獵到熊了。
At that time when Awi Takun was alive, I had already hunted a bear.

S.FORM: muudus muudus tama su siida na.
S.TRANSL: （那時）你父親還健在嗎？
Were your father still alive at that time?

S.FORM: muudus na ma bobona dung musa ku mangan sume yami ka pawan muhing dungan.
S.TRANSL: 我父親還健在..之後我又與Pawan Muhing協力獵到熊（另一隻）。
He was still alive. After that, I hunt another bear with Pawan Muhing.
是的。
Yes.

S.FORM: wada su nansay musa snegun deheya.
S.TRANSL: 你跟隨他們（狩獵）時是幾歲呢？
About what age did you go hunting with elders?
About twelve or eleven.
twelve?
it should be about twelve or thirteen

S.FORM: jyuuni nisay uxe su ba pkela biciq ba jyuici na wa.
S.TRANSL: 你不可能會（打獵）..11（歲）太小了，
How was it possible? Eleven years old is too small to go hunting.

S.FORM: ma um ini wada ku jyuisai hari seung ku naq paru.
S.TRANSL: 不，我約11（歲），我本來就個兒高大。
Yes, I was really about twelve, my height was tall enough you know.
即使個兒高大也..
Even if you are tall...

S.FORM: wada huwa mesa wada hu wada mhuqin maanu tama su wa mu ini hunuy lu saya.
S.TRANSL: 是如何..你父親是因何過世，我剛才尚未錄得。
I have not recorded yet how your father died.
知道。
I see.
請詳述，從頭說。
Tell me in detail from the beginning.
因（家父）與其他族人鬥毆而死的。
Since he was beaten by others, he died
他們鬥毆的原因是什麼呢？
What is the reason they beat your father.
（家父）被對方用杵具鎚擊。
He was pounded by mallet.
他們鬥毆的原因是什麼呢？
What is the reason they beat your father.

S.FORM: mona rudo mona rudo mkuni han ma.
S.TRANSL: 是起因於Mona Rudo與對方發生爭執。
For the reason of Mona Rudo, they went angry.
是誰槌擊（您父親）的？
Who thursted your father?
是來自Bkasan部落的族人。
People from Bkasan village
Bkasan部落的族人嗎？
People from Bkasan village?
一個叫做Kuwa的族人。
A person called Kuwa.
（是叫做）Kuwa (的人)。
(A person called) Kuwa.

S.FORM: mneyah bkasan ini usa theruy Boarung han deheya kii ciida.
S.TRANSL: 是來自Bkasan部落的族人嗎？當時他們（指Bkasan部落的族人）尚未遷至Boarung部落嗎？
Were they from Bkasan village? Hadn't they moved to Boarung village at that time?
還沒有，還居住在Bkasan部落。
Not yet, they still lived in Bkasan.
（Bkasan部落的族人）是由Pradu部落（遷至Bkasan部落）是嗎？
They had moved from Pradu village to Bkasan village, is that right?

S.FORM: un kndalax pradu ma musa bkasan.
S.TRANSL: 是的..（他們）從Pradu部落遷至Bkasan部落。
Yes, they originally moved from Pradu to Bkasan.
當初他們是因逃難而分散的。
At first, they escaped (from quake site) separately.

S.FORM: meniq a bkasan hii ka ruwah mu.
S.TRANSL: 我舅舅Ruwah就住在Bkasan。
My uncle, Ruwah, lived in Bkasan.
（Ruwah）是我媽媽的哥哥。
Ruwah is my mother's brother.
Ruwah（當時是）居住在Bkasan部落那邊嗎？
Did Ruwah live in Bkasan there (at that time)?

S.FORM: X huh mnenaq bkasan ruwah kiya.
S.TRANSL: 是居住在Bkasan部落。
Yes, he lived in Bkasan.

S.FORM: mnenaq Bkasan beebuun ka kuwa a.
S.TRANSL: Kuwa被（我們馬赫坡部落的親戚）揍。
Kuwa was beaten (by our relatives of Mhebu) somehow.

S.FORM: pshako bgurah ka hako ta nenaq henu hii peni.
S.TRANSL: 是在我們（馬赫坡部落）的新橋處嗎？
Was it at the new bridge (by our Mhebu tribe)?
我知道這件事。
I know that.

S.FORM: muda sipo napa ku na mmaha miyan busi ma inu.
S.TRANSL: 從對岸過（的那座橋），（有一次）家父揹著我（經過那座橋）要到Busi部落。
My father once passed that bridge and went to Busi village, carrying me on his back.
那是在你父親還健康的時候吧，還沒生病..
At that time, your father was still healthy. He was not sick yet.
（家父）就一直有胸痛的病情。
My father suffered from chest pain all the time.
那時（Pawan的父親）就一直生病了。
Pawan's father was ill for a long time then.

S.FORM: um uka ising uka eiuy ciida.
S.TRANSL: （當時我們部落）沒有醫生。
(At that time in our village) no doctor.

S.FORM: naka naq deh naka hbaro laqi bubu pawn pawan nii na.
S.TRANSL: (如果Pawan的爸爸沒發生這意外），Pawan的母親也應該有更多的子女。
(If the accident had not occurred to his father), Pawan's mother would have had more children.

S.FORM: ma o ma kika wada nanneng hari mnarux sanjyu nansay mnarux a.
S.TRANSL: 約30多歲時（開始）生病。
He started to be sick around thirty years old.
（他病了多少年？)依你的印象？
So, how many years had he been sick in your memory?

S.FORM: jyunansay gurai wa mnarux hii jyunanneng wa.
S.TRANSL: （他）病了10幾年。
He was sick for more than ten years.
五十幾年喔。
For more than fifty years..

S.FORM: gojyu nanneng naqah hei tama su.
S.TRANSL: 你父親病了50多年？
Was your father sick for fifty years?
是的。
Yes.
那麼久。
Such a long time.
（家父那時）就天天咳嗽。
My father coughed everyday.

S.FORM: o wada mnarux paru ciida mnarux ini tutuy bsiyaq.
S.TRANSL: （他）病得很嚴重，病得很長一段時間無法起身。
His illness was so serious that he could not get up by himself for a long time.

S.FORM: ma kndakax kii de isu ka smnegun seediq mosa.
S.TRANSL: 從那時起你跟隨族人去...
Since then, you went to hunt following elders...
別人也會（將Pawan的情況）向族人說的。
Others also told about Pawan family's situation like that.
先暫停。
Let me stop here for a moment.
好的。
OK.

S.FORM: um irih so rih so mona rudo tikuh dmanga isu di.
S.TRANSL: Mona Rudo幾乎扮演著養育你的長輩是嗎？
Mona Rudo played a role of your care-taker?

S.FORM: heya heya ka ini ppuuyas yaku di.
S.TRANSL: 可以說是Mona Rudo不讓我上學校唸書。
Then Mona Rudo also did not let me go to school.

S.FORM: inu heya ka so a qmlahang yaku di.
S.TRANSL: 他照護著我。
He took care of me

S.FORM: un rih so heya qmlalang yamu di na.
S.TRANSL: 由他照護著你一家人。
So he took care of your family.
I see.

S.FORM: kesaun na pukuh takun a drodux.
S.TRANSL: 就如..有一次（家母）改嫁到Drodux部落的Pukuh Takun。
It was when she went to remarry Pukuh Takun of Drodux village.

S.FORM: o kii kesaun su pukuh takun.
S.TRANSL: 你曾提過的那位Pukuh Takun..是嗎？
Is he the Pukuh Takun you mentioned?

S.FORM: pluwe laqi mosa platuc sapah alang seediq mesa.
S.TRANSL: （Mona Rudo）認為，若家母改嫁，我們做子女的會很可憐（會在繼父家受欺負）。
(Mona Rudo thought) If my mother got remarried, our children would be miserable (since we would be buried in the step-father's house.)
（家族的長輩們）是這麼說的。
(Elders of our family) they told like this.
是他（Mona Rudo）嗎？
About him (Mona Rudo)?
因為我們是親戚。
Because we were relatives.

S.FORM: un dmayo naq so mona rudo ka tama mu dmayo naq yami ka heya dungan.
S.TRANSL: 家父生前常幫助Mona Rudo，所以家父過逝後他（Mona Rudo）也幫助我們。
My father helped Mona Rudo, when he was alive. Thus, after my father passed away, he helped us.
這是互相的。
This is a mutual matter.

S.FORM: um um um pteyuxun miyan na pkparu ka yami ma paru nami do maha miyan mddayo dung.
S.TRANSL: 他（Mona Rudo）要趕快把我們養大，待我們長大後又可以幫他。
He rushed to bring us up, and we would help him after we grew up.
嗯。
I see.

S.FORM: tena ku wa ku mkela mheyan di peni.
S.TRANSL: 我當時我已會扛東西了。
I could shoulder at that time.

S.FORM: ye su wada jyuloku siji hari di.
S.TRANSL: （那時）你約16歲嗎？
About sixteen years old?
約13歲。
About thirteen
About thirteen to fourteen years old?

S.FORM: ma ku mbeyax mheyan di peni.
S.TRANSL: （那時）我已很能扛東西了。
since I could shoulder staff.

S.FORM: un wada huwa kesaun rmeus tama namu tama su wa reusun inu.
S.TRANSL: （你們父親過逝時）以何種方式埋葬.. 你父親..埋在何處？
When your father passed away, how did you bury him? Where did you bury him?
用布匹(pala)裹著。
We wrapped him with cloth,
用大布匹(pala)裹著。
with big cloth.
不讓（死者）躺平。
We did not let a corpse lay flat.
讓（死者）盤腿著地。
We let them crouch.
（墓穴）用鋤頭挖掘。
We dug grave with a hoe.
你們將（死者）葬於何處？
Where did you bury them?

S.FORM: kiya ka eniqan a nosaan ta eniqan a.
S.TRANSL: 就葬在有..我們（Pawan和我）曾去過的有...
We buried them where you and me have passed...
就是有家屋那兒嗎？
Is it where there are houses?

S.FORM: ini ta rumeus sapah ciida di.
S.TRANSL: 那時本族沒有屋內葬嗎？
At that time, didn't we bury in house?

S.FORM: ini da hndure wa hiya tama mu uri.
S.TRANSL: 那個時候已沒有（屋內葬）了，先父也葬在那兒.
We no more buried under house at that time. My father is also there.
本族不在屋內挖墓嗎？
Didn't People of our tribe bury corpse in house?
不葬在屋內。
No bury in house.
不葬在屋內。
No bury in house.

S.FORM: yamu de ini namu reus sapah di.
S.TRANSL: 你們（那個年代）已不葬在屋內了嗎？妳曾見過屋內葬？
We did not bury under house any more at that time? Have you ever seen burying in house?
妳看過（本族）有屋內葬嗎？
Did you seeour people buried in house?

S.FORM: uN ini ku kita a um um.
S.TRANSL: 沒見過。
No, I have not.

S.FORM: ke mkela su rmeus sapah toma repun qitaan mu qitaan miyan so nii peni.
S.TRANSL: 我見過（葬在）穀倉地基底下者，就像這樣看著。
I have seen a people buried under storehouse. I was looking at it like this.
（葬在）穀倉地基底下嗎？
Were they buried under storehouse?
（沒見過葬在）住家屋內者，見過（葬在）穀倉地基底下者。
I have not seen burying in house, I have only seen burying under a storehouse.

S.FORM: tahtunux o smeling tahtunux do tlwayan hiya da wa hii tama mu uri.
S.TRANSL: （在日治時期）將公墓設在Tlwayan了，先父即葬在那兒。
(During Japanese period,) they opened a place for cemetery. Since then, we bury people in Tlwayan.
先父葬在那兒。
My father is also there.

S.FORM: wa hii ka elu na mesa eniqan gamin qhuni muda ku qduriq klaali miisu ku habung wa so hiya peni.
S.TRANSL: 到那墓地的路在那邊，那條路像這樣有樹根（樹頭），我經過那條路時我都會逃開，因我怕經過那墳墓之地。
The road bound to the cemetery is there. That road has a stump like this. Whenever I passed there, I would turn aside, because I felt fear passing there.

S.FORM: um ini uda hii saya di tiwas.
S.TRANSL: Tiwas，現今的道路已不經過那邊了。
Tiwas does not pass there any more.

S.FORM: qduriq klaali mtali kana pusu mu ngungu miisu habung kiya.
S.TRANSL: 害怕經過那墳墓之地, Pawan，即使是我用想像的依然會害怕，經過.. 我都會逃開，我打從心理（由衷）的害怕。
I felt so scared passing the cemetry there.
經過上方的路。
via the road above...

S.FORM: a a so o o angali han pawan angali angali.
S.TRANSL: Pawan，拿一下。
Pawan, get it (for me).
妳知道（葬在）穀倉地基底下的是嗎？
You know we buried under a storehouse, is that right?
那我知道。
I know that.
妳曾見過嗎？
Have you ever seen it?
我見過。
I saw it.

S.FORM: ma hmuwa uka rmeus sapah ita.
S.TRANSL: 如何.. 本族人沒有葬在住家屋內的嗎？
How did not we have custom burying in house?
沒有。
We did not.
眉原群（Bgala屬泰雅族澤敖利系統）的人有採屋內葬。
People of Bgala (who belong to Squliq Atayal) have a custom burying in house.
是眉原群的人有採屋內葬嗎？
So, people of Bgala have a custom buring in house.

S.FORM: ita we a truma na repun ita.
S.TRANSL: 本族是葬在穀倉地基底下嗎？
We buried under storehouse, is that right?
（葬在）穀倉地基底下。
Under storehouse.

S.FORM: a uxe uxe repun uri so nganguc gaga uri peni nganguc ta nanak.
S.TRANSL: 也不是（葬在）穀倉..就如住家的院子外，屬自己家的院子。
not exactly under storehouse, we buried them outside of house like a yard of own house.

S.FORM: so o asi reusi hii seediq cbeyo.
S.TRANSL: 本族以前的死者就葬在那兒（院子）嗎？
So we buried corpse in yard?

S.FORM: ma ini ta usa rmeus nganguc seediq nganguc ta nanak.
S.TRANSL: 我們不會葬到別人的院子，是葬在自家的院子。
We did not bury somebody else's yard. We buried them in our own yards.
（葬在）屬於自己的地。
Under the own ground.

S.FORM: n ita nak dheran ini preus seediq.
S.TRANSL: （葬在）屬於自己的私有地. 我們不會互相埋在對方的地。
Under the own ground. We don't bury the dead in each other's land.

S.FORM: o o o ma musa so toma a mudu so gaga uri ga toma mudu so gaga baki mu.
S.TRANSL: 就像葬在橘子樹之下(的位置)，先祖父就葬在像那樣的橘子樹之下。
It's like we buried them under the orange trees. My late grandfather were buried under oranges trees like that.
我們自己的地。
That was our land.

S.FORM: a mari naq liwas heya ga musa liwas paru peni tuki tuki paru.
S.TRANSL: 他（生前）就先預購了甕，他被放進大甕中，大口的甕中（再葬入墓穴中）。
He bought big pot while alive. He was put inside the pot with big mouth.
大約...
About...
（生前）這種埋法是誰教的？
Who taught us to bury the dead like this?

S.FORM: heya naq ma heya naq bnari tktuki paru paru quwaq wa.
S.TRANSL: 是他（先祖父）自己（要先預購大甕的），
It was grandfather himself (that ordered the pot).
（那大甕的口）足以讓死者放入。
It is big enough to put corpse.
大口甕是他自己買的。（他們）會預先準備。
He bought the pot with a big mouth by himself. They prepared first.
是他們自己買的吧？
They may buy it by themselves.
他們會預先準備死後要用的大口甕。
They ordered the pot they will use after they were dead.

S.FORM: kiya qitaun mu patis rmeus ta sapah si ma.
S.TRANSL: 我看過文獻資料提到本族是採屋內葬。
I have read in a book that our people had custom of burying in house.
沒有, 泰雅族眉原群才有。
no, it is Bgala.
原來（採屋內葬的）是泰雅眉原群的人。
It was Bgala people who had that custom.

S.FORM: toda sapah ma toda toda rmeus sapah.
S.TRANSL: 泰雅眉原群的人採屋內葬..還有賽德克Toda群的人。
Bgala people, as well as Toda people.
Toda群的人採屋內葬，我是不曉得。
Do Toda people have custom of buring in house? I do not know that.

S.FORM: kela mita um rmeus sapah daha.
S.TRANSL: Toda群的人..葬在家屋內。
Toda people buried in house.

S.FORM: um um um so kelaun ani rneus rudan ta cbeyo ini ta qita uri peni.
S.TRANSL: 或許我們的先祖也曾採屋內葬，只是我們沒看過（沒能趕上）。
We possibly had a custom of buring in house, but we were not in time to witness that.

S.FORM: kika mekan ido plaale mangan deheya uri si.
S.TRANSL: 要吃飯時他們（亡者的亡靈）也會搶著先吃。
When we eat, the ghosts also scramble for meal.

S.FORM: meniq ka siida si pawan na ini osaan sndehu na ini ini ini adis qbulic seediq.
S.TRANSL: Pawan，聽說那時候，（族人們）要安葬死者時沒帶木灰（家中生火的灰燼）。
Pawan, I heard at that time, when we bury them, we did not bring wood ash (ash produced by burning wood for housework).

S.FORM: asi se asi usa sndehu ma qitaan utux daha meyah mekan kiya di si.
S.TRANSL: （不撒木灰）直接將亡者安葬... （那樣安葬的年代裡）可看到亡者的亡靈來吃東西。
(We did not scatter wood ash). We buried them directly (during the age of that custom). We could see a ghost of the person came to eat food.
一個人---在後面這樣來。
There was a person came from back like this.

S.FORM: berah um um um ma dmidin naq qbulic ka mhiti bukuy.
S.TRANSL: 有殿後者提著木灰（在送葬的路上沿途撒木灰）。
and the person who is scattered was in the back (He scattered ash along the road).

S.FORM: ima ka m m m mrehak a qbulic.
S.TRANSL: 是誰做（執行）撒木灰的行動？
Who scatterd ash?
另外一個人。
Another person.
小孩。
A child.
小孩。
A child.
是小孩、或是女性、或者任何人都可以？
A child, a woman or anyone could do it?
任何人都可以。
Anyone would do.
一定要是亡者的親戚嗎？或者不一定（沒關係）？
Should he be a relative of a dead person, or it does not matter?

S.FORM: ita nanak laqi ita nak tndadan.
S.TRANSL: 要與亡者有親戚關係者。
He should be a relative.
如亡者的兄弟姐妹。
Like siblings of the dead.
我們與亡者有親戚關係者。
Person who has relative relationship with the dead.

S.FORM: kleelu naq a rmehak qbulic di.
S.TRANSL: 沿路撒木灰嗎？
Did you scatted ash along a road?

S.FORM: un kndalax siida ini eyah a mgeela mangan baga daha mekan di sa.
S.TRANSL: 從那時就沒有亡靈來與活著的人搶著吃的（東西）。
From that time a ghost will come to scramble for food with people alive.

S.FORM: X qitaan baga na mangan sa ini qitai hei .
S.TRANSL: 據說活著的人可看到亡靈們的手，但卻看不到亡靈們的身軀。
I heard we could see their hand but could not see their body.

S.FORM: kndalax ciida di si ma ini qitai baga daha meyah mgeela mekan di si ma mangan baga a naq seediq mangan naq deheya uri si.
S.TRANSL: 從那時起，就看不到亡靈們的手搶著拿吃的東西，活著的人要拿（東西）亡靈們也搶著要拿東西。
Since then, the invisible ghost competes with us with his hand. People alive scramble for food, the ghost also scramble for food.

S.FORM: ma msdagni naq a bsukan uri si.
S.TRANSL: 亡靈們也會肩搭著肩酒醉。
Ghosts would get drunk themselves blind too.

S.FORM: qitaan daha uxe mberiq kari nii wa bale bale kari kiya.
S.TRANSL: 活著的人可看得到。
People alive could see them like that.

S.FORM: yaani bale kari cbeyo kana nii mona rudo kari tnkari tmgesa yaku kiya.
S.TRANSL: 這樣的傳說不是誆人的，而是真的.這樣的傳說是Mona Rudo告訴我的。
A story like this is not a lie. It is true. It is what Mona Rudo told me.

S.FORM: tmgesa kana rudan uxe wino heya.
S.TRANSL: 不是只有他（Mona Rudo）有傳述，所有的族老都會傳述。
Not only him, our elderly people all could tell this story.

S.FORM: rmeus rmeus ta toma qlapo ciida sa ma mtahu ta puniq plaale mtahu puniq deheya sa baga na msdangi .
S.TRANSL: 聽說那時我們將亡者葬在（亡者生前）臥榻下方的地裡..，當我們要生火時他們會搶先生火。
I heard that corpse were buried under beds. Ghosts scramble for fire when people maked fire.

S.FORM: anu kesaun daha waga angalun a maanu ka pradu hii wa qitaan daha utux na msdangi bsukan sa.
S.TRANSL: 他們（族老們）說Pradu部落被..，他們看到亡靈們肩搭著肩酒醉。在Pradu部落那兒
Elderly people said they could see drunken ghost with shoulder crossing shoulder in Pradu village,

S.FORM: pradu hii sa ado wada angalun sunu peni uN pradu kiya.
S.TRANSL: 因Pradu部落地震時被山崩的土石所掩埋。
since the place was buried by landslide.
是的（就是那樣），被山崩的土石所掩埋。
I see. The place was buried by landslide.
XXX
XXX
